category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Gambia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入冈比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入甘比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Gambia entry gates including TGSB standards conformity status, PURA utility regulation, NAWEC grid coordination, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, IEC 61000 EMC expectations, tropical humidity and dust derating, and the practical limits of a very small early-stage EV market — versus China GB/T 18487.1, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与冈比亚准入门槛对照，包括TGSB标准合格评定状态、PURA公用事业监管、NAWEC电网协调、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC预期、热带湿热和粉尘降额，以及极小且早期电动汽车市场的实际限制——对比中国GB/T 18487.1、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基线。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與甘比亞准入門檻對照，包括TGSB標準合格評定狀態、PURA公用事業監管、NAWEC電網協調、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC預期、熱帶濕熱和粉塵降額，以及極小且早期電動汽車市場的實際限制——對比中國GB/T 18487.1、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基線。

answer_first.en: Gambia has no publicly confirmed standalone EV charger product regulation or mass public EV charging programme as of 2026-06-14. The practical route is project-specific: confirm TGSB conformity expectations, obtain PURA and NAWEC coordination for any grid-connected installation, design to Gambia's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid, use IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 safety evidence, specify IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC where an IEC-aligned charger is required, and provide IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality data. China GB/T-only chargers are not plug-compatible with IEC 62196 and GB/T 27930 DC communication is not a CCS2/OCPP substitute. Given Gambia's small market, grid deficits, low electrification constraints, humidity, dust, and limited public EV fleet, exporters should treat shipments as engineered pilots or donor/project procurements rather than routine catalogue exports.
answer_first.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能从公开来源确认冈比亚存在独立的电动汽车充电桩产品强制法规或大规模公共充电计划。实际路径应按项目确认：核实TGSB合格评定预期；任何并网安装均需与PURA和NAWEC协调；按冈比亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网设计；提供IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全证据；在要求IEC体系充电桩时采用交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；并提供IEC 61000 EMC及电能质量资料。仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩与IEC 62196物理不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通信也不能替代CCS2/OCPP。鉴于冈比亚市场很小、电网存在短板、电气化水平受限、湿热和粉尘环境明显且公共电动车队有限，出口商应将出货视为工程化试点或捐助方/项目采购，而非常规目录出口。
answer_first.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能從公開來源確認甘比亞存在獨立的電動汽車充電樁產品強制法規或大規模公共充電計劃。實際路徑應按項目確認：核實TGSB合格評定預期；任何併網安裝均需與PURA和NAWEC協調；按甘比亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網設計；提供IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全證據；在要求IEC體系充電樁時採用交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；並提供IEC 61000 EMC及電能質量資料。僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁與IEC 62196物理不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通訊也不能替代CCS2/OCPP。鑑於甘比亞市場很小、電網存在短板、電氣化水平受限、濕熱和粉塵環境明顯且公共電動車隊有限，出口商應將出貨視為工程化試點或捐助方/項目採購，而非常規目錄出口。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TGSB scope determination, PURA licence or tariff approval, NAWEC grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Gambia's EV charging market is early-stage and several requirements are not publicly confirmed. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, donors, and installers should verify current TGSB standards notices, PURA licensing and regulatory requirements, NAWEC connection conditions, IEC standard editions, site electrical design, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TGSB适用范围裁定、PURA许可证或电价批准、NAWEC并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。冈比亚电动汽车充电市场仍处于早期阶段，若干要求尚未从公开来源确认。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商、捐助方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行TGSB标准公告、PURA许可及监管要求、NAWEC接入条件、IEC标准版本、现场电气设计和海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TGSB適用範圍裁定、PURA許可證或電價批准、NAWEC併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。甘比亞電動汽車充電市場仍處於早期階段，若干要求尚未從公開來源確認。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商、捐助方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行TGSB標準公告、PURA許可及監管要求、NAWEC接入條件、IEC標準版本、現場電氣設計和海關要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
